title: Metrics Export Policy
description: Validates ao_kernel/defaults/policies/policy_metrics.v1.json (and any workspace override). Policy knobs cover top-level enable + opt-in advanced label allowlist. See docs/METRICS.md §3.

enabled.description: Master switch for metric emission. Bundled default: false (dormant). Operator opt-in to activate Prometheus textfile export at ao-kernel metrics export.
Advanced-label master switch. When false, only the default low-cardinality label set is emitted.

allowlist.description: Operator-selected subset of advanced labels to emit. Unknown values fail schema validation at load; typos do not silently enable anything. Default: empty list (no advanced labels even when labels_advanced.enabled=true — defence in depth).
